issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.
The skill is tightly coupled to CopilotKit and does not support other AI agent frameworks.

scenarios.name: setup-chat-sidebar
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies the rubric, while Response B omits the required CopilotKit wrapper, sidebar, and runtime setup.

scenarios.name: define-project-actions
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A does not use the required Copilot hooks.
